steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The word thereby signals a logical requirement: the blank must describe an action that enables investors to shift focus away from worries to opportunities. For this logic to work, the blank must reduce or ease the concerns.

steps.title: Match the required meaning
steps.content: Assuage means to calm or soothe — especially fears and concerns. When the regulatory oversight assuages investors' worries, they are freed to focus on business opportunities instead. The other three either mean to assign/designate (A), intensify concerns (B), or communicate information (D) — none would logically enable this shift in focus. That matches choice C — C is correct.
